free_text: Study of activation cross sections of
Ti,V,Cr,Fe,Ni,Cu and Zn with protons up to 20 MeV
At 12 MeV.
At 20 MeV.
Stacks of metal sheets of a thickness exceeding
of 10 to 25 microns.
A little correction has been done. Lower Ca
Last checking has been done.
SD: Major corrections in all Subents.
SD: Corrections in Subents 002-009; 011-018
The foil of high purity pure metal has been used.

N.Otsuka:'The decay gamma energy and half-lives are
not specified in the source article. The y-axis of
Fig.6 shows 'sigma-A', which definition in Sect.3.1
(sigma-A=sigma*(%gamma)*(%X) shows the cross section
is for decay gamma production for a natural sample.'
